# SQLite to Postgres Migration â€” Drift Anchor
*Generated by PlanForge on 2026-05-09. Not a deliverable â€” specdrift reference only.*

## Problem
SQLite connection lifecycle causes `unable to open database file` errors after hours of operation on macOS with Python 3.14 + SQLite 3.51. Recycled connection and no-close wrappers only delay the failure. The system already runs local Postgres with pgvector for embeddings, creating a redundant dual-DB architecture.

## Solution
Migrate all data and queries from SQLite to the existing local Postgres database (`vibez_monitor` on `localhost:5432`). Replace `better-sqlite3` in dashboard with `pg` Pool. Replace `sqlite3`/`get_connection` in backend with `psycopg` connection pool. Eliminate SQLite entirely.

## Target Architecture
- **DB**: Postgres `vibez_monitor` @ localhost:5432 (same as pgvector today)
- **Backend**: `psycopg` pool via new `vibez/db.py`
- **Dashboard**: `pg` Pool via new `src/lib/db.ts`
- **Railway push**: Postgres â†’ Postgres (simplified)

## Out of Scope
- Changing Beeper Desktop API integration
- Changing Google Groups IMAP integration
- Changing classification pipeline logic
- Changing dashboard UI
- Changing synthesis/wisdom extraction LLM prompts

## Success Criteria
- All SQLite usage removed from backend and dashboard
- Sync runs stably without `unable to open database` errors
- Dashboard reads from Postgres
- Railway push works with Postgres source
- All existing data migrated and verified
- Tests pass

## Key Constraints
- Uses existing local Postgres (already has pgvector extension)
- Must preserve all 46K+ messages, 46K embeddings, 6K+ wisdom topics
- Keep Railway push working
- Keep dashboard working

## Task Breakdown

### Phase 1: Schema (foundational â€” all other tasks depend on this)
- `p1-schema`: Create Postgres schema + migrate data from SQLite

### Phase 2: Backend (parallelizable after Phase 1)
- `p2-backend-db`: Rewrite `vibez/db.py` for psycopg pool
- `p2-backend-core`: Update beeper_sync, google_groups_sync, classifier, budget_guard, links
- `p2-backend-synthesis`: Update synthesis.py, wisdom.py, chat_agent, author_classifier
- `p2-backend-semantic`: Simplify semantic_index (no more SQLite bridge)
- `p2-backend-push`: Simplify push_remote (no SQLite reading)
- `p2-backend-scripts`: Update all backend/scripts/*.py

### Phase 3: Dashboard (parallelizable after Phase 1)
- `p3-dashboard-db`: Rewrite `src/lib/db.ts` for pg Pool
- `p3-dashboard-libs`: Update catchup, api-usage, push-ingest, link-search
- `p3-dashboard-routes`: Update API routes (push, settings)
- `p3-dashboard-semantic`: Verify semantic.ts works (already uses pg)

### Phase 4: Integration & Cleanup (after Phase 2 + 3)
- `p4-config`: Update config, .env, launchd plists
- `p4-tests`: Update all test fixtures and tests
- `p4-cleanup`: Remove SQLite files, verify everything
